biological_replicate: PAM was prepared using bronchoalveolar lavage and PK-15 cells.
technical_replicate: All data are presented as mean values ± standard errors from three independent experiments.
experimental_design: the interaction network between MGF360-9L and cellular proteins was constructed using the STRING database.
factor_value: the interaction between ASFV MGF360-9L and cellular proteins.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates (PAM and PK-15 cells) and 1 fraction.
